pdn.desc: Proposed Phase 1 Subdivision of the Lawrence Heights Redevelopment includes the provision of new pulbic streets, and a public park.  Cross Reference OPA/Rezoning file 10 140382 NNY 15 OZ and Rental Housing Demolition File 10 140409 NNY 00 RH.

Lawrence Heights Phase 1 - Toronto Community Housing Corporations.  Draft plan of subdivision application for the North East District of phase 1 of the Lawrence Heights revitalization.  The application proposes the creation of new public roads, private development blocks and a new public park.  Please also see applications 10 140382 NNY 15 OZ and 10 170538 NNY 15 SB.

Phase 3 of IQ development consisting of 915 units housed in three towers connected via a three-storey podium. The towers are proposed at 19, 26 and 42 storeys. A total of 773 parking spaces are proposed. A 284 square metre Community Space is also proposed at-grade.
